title: Thoda Thoda Malarnthathenna - Indhira
stanzas:
thoda thoda
malarnthathenna , poove
thottavanai marandhathenna.

paarvaigal puthithaa
sparisangal puthithaa
mazhai vara boomi
maruppathenna

thoda thoda
malarnthathenna , poove
thottavanai marandhathenna.

andha ila vayathil
aatrankarai manalil
kaaladi thadam pathithom
yaar alithaar.

nandhavana karaiyil
nattu vaitha sediyil
mottu vitta mudhar poovai
yaar parithaar.

kadhalar theendaatha
pookkalil then illai.
idaiveli thaandaathe
en vasam naanillai.

thoda thoda
malarnthathenna ,poove
chuda chuda nenaindhathenna.

paarvaigal pudhithu
sparisangal pudhithu
narambugal pinna pinna
nadukkam enna.

thoda thoda
malarnthathenna ,poove
chuda chuda nenaindhathenna..

panithanil kulitha
paal malar kaana
irubathu vasanthangal
vizhi valarthen.

pasithavan amudham
parugida thaane
pdhinelu vasanthangal
idhazh valarthen.

ilai moodum malaraaga
idhayathai maraikkaathe.
malar kollum kaattraaga
idhayathai ulukkaathe.

thoda thoda
malarnthathenna ,poove
chuda chuda nenaindhathenna.

thoda thoda
malarnthathenna , poove
thottavanai marandhathenna.
tamilStanzas:
தொட தொட மலர்ந்ததென்ன
பூவே தொட்டவனை மறந்ததென்ன.

பார்வைகள் புதிதா 
ஸ்பரிசங்கள் புதிதா 
மழை வர பூமி மறுப்பதென்ன

தொட தொட மலர்ந்ததென்ன , 
பூவே தொட்டவனை மறந்ததென்ன.

அந்த இள வயதில் 
ஆற்றங்கரை மணலில் 
காலடி தடம் பதித்தோம் 
யார் அழித்தார்.

நந்தவன கரையில் 
நட்டு வைத்த செடியில் 
மொட்டு விட்ட 
முதற்பூவை யார் பறித்தார்.

தொட தொட மலர்ந்ததென்ன ,
பூவே சுட சுட நனைந்ததென்ன

பார்வைகள் புதிது 
ஸ்பரிசங்கள் புதிது 
நரம்புகள் பின்ன பின்ன
நடுக்கம் என்ன.

தொட தொட மலர்ந்ததென்ன ,
பூவே சுட சுட நனைந்ததென்ன

பனிதனில்  குளித்த 
பால் மலர் காண 
இருபது வசந்தங்கள் 
விழி வளர்த்தேன்.

பசித்தவன் அமுதம் 
பருகிட தானே 
பதினேழு வசந்தங்கள் 
இதழ் வளர்த்தேன்.

இலை  மூடும் மலராக 
இதயத்தை மறைக்காதே. 
மலர் கொள்ளும் காற்றாக 
இதயத்தை உலுக்காதே.

தொட தொட மலர்ந்ததென்ன ,
பூவே சுட சுட நனைந்ததென்ன .

தொட தொட மலர்ந்ததென்ன , 
பூவே தொட்டவனை மறந்ததென்ன.

seo.title: Thoda Thoda Malarnthathenna - Indhira

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses themes of love and remembrance, highlighting the beauty of fleeting moments.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Indhira, this song plays during a romantic sequence, emphasizing the emotional connection between the lead characters.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the melodious voices of Chitra and SPB.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Thoda Thoda Malarnthathenna was composed by the renowned AR Rahman.

When was this song released?

This song was released on May 11, 1995.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Thoda Thoda Malarnthathenna, the enchanting duet by Chitra and SPB encapsulates the essence of love and nostalgia. The song unfolds in a pivotal moment of the movie Indhira, where the characters reflect on their feelings and memories. With AR Rahman's soulful composition and Vairamuthu's poignant lyrics, it evokes a deep emotional response, making it a timeless classic. The melody resonates with anyone who has experienced the beauty of love and longing.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Thoda Thoda Malarnthathenna from the Indhira soundtrack is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of Chitra and SPB, paired with AR Rahman's magical composition, this song transports listeners to a world of romance. Experience the lyrical brilliance of Vairamuthu as it evokes deep emotions and nostalgia.
stanzaMeanings: Little by little, blooming, have I forgotten the one who touched the flower.
Are the sights new? Are the touches new? Why is the rain changing the earth?
Little by little, blooming, have I forgotten the one who touched the flower.
In that youthful age, we have left footprints in the sand, who has erased them?
Who has seen the flower that bloomed in the village on the banks of the garden?
In the flowers that do not belong to lovers, there is no honey. If I don't give you my heart, I am not yours.
Little by little, blooming, have I remembered the flower?
Are the sights new? Are the touches new? What is the pain that follows?
Little by little, blooming, have I remembered the flower?
In the coolness, I see the flower of milk, I let the spring bloom in my eyes.
The hungry one drinks nectar, and thus I let the spring bloom in my heart.
Do not hide your heart like a flower that closes. Do not let the wind that carries flowers hide your heart.
Little by little, blooming, have I remembered the flower?
Little by little, blooming, have I forgotten the one who touched the flower.
